name: skills
description: Applied skills: shadcn-tailwind (shadcn 4 + Tailwind v4), the design family (improve-layout, improve-motion, design-polish, design-taste), optimistic-ui (write local first, reconcile with the network), quality-audit (stack-aware repo audit), saltintesta (prose tone), flavored-md (GFM form-matching), zoom-out (strategic project review), ship (commit pipeline whose message is context for the next agent, with a folded decision-log step). Narrow, stack-specific discipline.
